props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about 24/7 AC Repairs in {city}

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for after-hours AC repairs?
faqs.answer: We offer competitive rates for emergency services. While after-hours calls may have a service fee, we always provide upfront pricing before starting any work so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: How quickly can a technician arrive for an emergency AC repair?
faqs.answer: We prioritize emergency calls and typically have a technician at your door within 1-2 hours, depending on your location in the {city} area. Our dispatch team works around the clock to get you help fast.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an AC emergency?
faqs.answer: An AC emergency includes a complete system failure during extreme heat, strange burning smells from your unit, water leaking from the system causing property damage, or any situation where lack of cooling poses a health risk to vulnerable household members.
